archetype: Industrial Utility / Clean Functional (Derived from Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast)
rationale: The application is a functional, offline utility tool for mechanics and workshop managers. It requires high clarity, dense but breathable data layouts, and clear calls to action without distracting decorative elements. The 'Pyydys' reference indicates a clean white background, a strong blue primary, and soft rounded structural elements.

layout.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64 on desktop, hidden or bottom-bar on mobile. Features icon-based navigation, active states with blue accent backgrounds, and a persistent Status Card at the bottom.
layout.main_container: Flex-1, max-w-7xl mx-auto, p-6 or p-8. Allows vertical scrolling.
layout.active_jobs_page: Bento Grid Mode: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8. Two main columns ('Services' and 'Odd Jobs').
layout.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding for cards (p-6). Tight spacing between list items (gap-3).

card.header: Flex row, items-center justify-between, pb-4 mb-4 border-b border-slate-100
card.override_shadcn: Change default Shadcn Card radius to rounded-2xl. Remove heavy shadows.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95 px-6 py-2
buttons.override_shadcn: Override Shadcn Button radius to rounded-full for primary CTAs to match the reference pill shape.

list_item.style: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors gap-4
list_item.actions: Opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity (on desktop), always visible on mobile.

empty_state.style: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-center

badges.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold font-mono

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (white to slate-50) on interactive elements.
micro_interactions.active: Press scale down (active:scale-95) on primary pill buttons.
micro_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out universally for color/transform changes.

icons_strategy.usage: Functional mapping. 'Wrench' for Services, 'ClipboardList' for Odd Jobs, 'CheckCircle' for Mark Done, 'Archive' for Archive, 'Settings' for Config.

state_management.architecture: Use a custom React hook (e.g., useLocalStorage) to manage arrays of objects for Services, Odd Jobs, Places, People, Vehicles, and UI Labels.
state_management.i18n_labels: Store a dictionary of button/heading names in localStorage to support the 'rename every button' requirement.

testing.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based. E.g., data-testid='add-service-button', data-testid='sidebar-archive-link'.

empty_state_illustration.description: Subtle background or empty state anchor image if required, showing a clean industrial metal frame.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a strictly offline architecture using localStorage for all data. Do not install or configure any cloud SDKs.
Create a Settings page that acts as a dictionary manager, allowing users to override default strings (e.g., 'New Service', 'Active Jobs') and persist them to localStorage.
The main layout must be a vertical list, split into two columns (Services on left, Odd Jobs on right) on desktop. DO NOT build a month-view grid calendar.
Override default Shadcn styles: use 'rounded-2xl' for cards and 'rounded-full' for primary CTA buttons to match the Pyydys reference.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and interactive lists have a 'data-testid' attribute.
For the Archive page, group the listed jobs by date (descending), using a timeline or sectioned list layout.
